name: Pecan Surprise
recipeIngredient: 2 small packages French Vanilla Instant Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix the flour and pecans together with the melted butter.
3. Press firmly into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit, then let cool completely.
5. Beat together the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and first Cool Whip and pour over the cooled crust.
6. Mix the instant pudding by reducing the milk to 3 cups instead of 4 and pour over the cream cheese mixture.
7. Cover with the second Cool Whip and garnish with pecan chips.
